_publications._publicationTitle: Gene Expression, Network Analysis, and Drug Discovery of Neurofibromatosis Type 2-Associated Vestibular Schwannomas Based on Bioinformatics Analysis.

_contextSnippet: using MCODE, three modules with scores >4.5 and a number of nodes >18 were selected. Module 1 with a score of 9.368 consisted of 20 nodes and 89 edges
details: Identified three functional modules with scores >4.5: Module 1 (score 9.368, 20 nodes, 89 edges), Module 2 (score 4.588, 18 nodes, 39 edges), and Module 3 (score 4.455, 23 nodes, 49 edges)
